prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第103名持续上升至2025年第61名、2026年第63名，近年排名显著提升，学校整体吸引力增强；20 26年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要原因系2025年该校在河北、河南等省份录取位次下滑超500名，中医学专业在部分省份出现断档，可能对2026年安徽考生报考心理产生一定滞 后影响；抖音热度一般（总排名第103名），短视频曝光量偏低；该校以中医学、中药学、针灸推拿学等为特色，作为 中医药大学中唯一的211院校，学科优势突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业整体社会热度平稳；本省2026年物理类考生估算约31.6万人，较2025年32.1万人略有减少（约- 1.6%），竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次39056名、2026年扩招至59人、声誉偏负面信号、软科排名上升及考生略减等多重因素，扩招效应与声誉偏负面主导，预计位次；预测最低位次约40810名，区间40310-41310名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 18601 → 27814 → 20515 → 33955 → 39056, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 18541 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 39056; the provincial physics category enrollment plan was 38 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 51 in 2024, and 55 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 59, an increase of 4 (7.3%) compared to 2025, making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the overall attractiveness of the school; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly due to a decline of over 500 places in admission rankings in provinces such as Hebei and Henan in 2025, and a gap in some provinces for the Chinese Medicine major, which may have a lagging impact on the application psychology of Anhui candidates in 2026; Douyin popularity is average (103rd overall), with low short video exposure; the school is known for Chinese Medicine, Chinese Materia Medica, Acupuncture and Tuina, and as the only 211 institution among Chinese medicine universities, it has outstanding disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of medical majors is stable; the estimated number of physics category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 316,000, a slight decrease from 321,000 in 2025 (about -1.6%), slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 39056, expansion to 59 in 2026, negative reputation signals, rising Soft Science ranking, and a slight decrease in candidates, the expansion effect and negative reputation dominate; the predicted minimum ranking is about 40810, with a range of 40310-41310.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 40310-41300, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 40000), focus on Tier 1 long-term Chinese Medicine programs and leading talent classes; for rankings near the upper limit (outside 41300), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors and apply cautiously.
